name: loden-consulting-theme
description: A modern WordPress theme with Tailwind CSS v4, ACF blocks, and WooCommerce support

scripts.build:css: postcss src/css/app.css -o style.tmp.css && cat src/css/theme-header.css style.tmp.css > style.css && rm style.tmp.css && postcss src/css/editor.css -o style-editor.css
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.start:css: postcss src/css/app.css -o style.tmp.css --watch & postcss src/css/editor.css -o style-editor.css --watch

author: Loden Consulting
